metadata.title: aliang.one - ALiang AI
metadata.description: ALiang AI API Gateway - Providing stable and reliable AI interface services

editorial.footerAbout: ALiang is a reliable gateway connecting you to the world's leading large models — redefining AI API services with a stable architecture, smart routing, and edge-grade latency.

home.heroLead: From model proxy and tooling integration to mobile vibecoding, ALiang offers developers a continuously updated AI coding studio service.
home.dockNote: Judge the studio in one page: ethos first, then capabilities, method, and entry points.

home.aboutTitle: Not a one-off tool page, but a continuously maintained AI coding studio
home.aboutLead1: ALiang focuses on the problems developers hit again and again: flaky model services, fragmented toolchains, mobile scenarios that stall, and nobody to judge the latest tech for you.
home.aboutLead2: The home page carries the brand: it tells developers someone is continuously tracking mainstream AI services and coding workflows. Specific services can iterate with the tech, but the underlying promise stays constant.
home.capTitle: The AI capabilities developers touch every day, organized into executable service modules
home.capLead: Services can keep expanding, but the first screen shows three things: model services, dev toolchains, and mobile coding continuity.

capCards.title: Frontier AI proxy
capCards.desc: Unified access to OpenAI, Anthropic, and other formats — less service-switching and config overhead.

capCards.title: VSCode / Cursor proficiency
capCards.desc: Prompts, context organization, debugging, and refactoring workflows organized around real engineering.

capCards.title: Mobile vibecoding
capCards.desc: Keep starting, tracking, and organizing coding tasks from your phone — fewer breaks when you leave the desk.

capCards.title: Continuous tech tracking
capCards.desc: Track model, tool, and API changes; translate new capabilities into things developers can try directly.

home.labsTitle: A continuously updated AI coding service catalog

labCards.title: Multi-model format adapter
labCards.desc: Organize different model services into a more stable access pattern, less project-switching cost.

labCards.title: Context and task breakdown
labCards.desc: Help developers split fuzzy requirements into engineering tasks AI can execute.

labCards.title: Remote vibecoding
labCards.desc: Keep describing, generating, checking, and tracking code tasks from mobile.

labCards.title: Code and artifact verification
labCards.desc: Check AI output against real engineering constraints, not just generation speed.

labCards.title: Latest capability watch
labCards.desc: Filter noteworthy model updates, IDE features, and dev-tool changes.

home.methodTitle: From problem to usable workflow, in four steps
home.methodLead: ALiang treats AI coding not as a one-time install but as a reusable, reviewable, portable working method.

methodSteps.title: Find the bottleneck
methodSteps.desc: First see whether you're stuck on models, tools, environment, or task breakdown.

methodSteps.title: Organize context
methodSteps.desc: Turn projects, code, goals, and constraints into inputs AI can understand reliably.

methodSteps.title: Onboard services
methodSteps.desc: Configure proxy, IDE, mobile, or a hybrid workflow per scenario.

methodSteps.title: Review continuously
methodSteps.desc: As models and tools shift, keep what works, replace what expired.

home.workTitle: ALiang is more a studio entrance than a list of single features
home.workLead: The home page builds brand trust; specific services live on the services and download pages, shown via a timeline and platform entries.

workCards.title: Services: shipped and in-research capability routes
workCards.desc: Explains the service status of Cursor, VSCode, API proxy, and mobile vibecoding for developers.

workCards.title: Download: desktop and mobile install entry points
workCards.desc: Splits Windows, Linux, macOS, Android, and iOS status so users can judge available platforms directly.

home.quoteText: Developers don't lack another button — they lack a person and workflow that keeps up with a changing tech landscape.
home.ctaTitle: Hand your dev workflow to ALiang for a diagnosis
home.ctaLead: If you're building AI coding services, optimizing Cursor / VSCode flows, or turning remote mobile vibecoding into a real product, start with a tech diagnosis.
home.copySuccess: Diagnosis brief copied — paste and fill it in.
home.copyError: Copy failed — please record the brief manually.
home.briefText:
ALiang tech diagnosis brief:
1. Current AI coding scenario:
2. Models / proxy / IDE in use:
3. Biggest blocker:
4. Need remote mobile vibecoding:
5. What ALiang should diagnose first:

services.heroTitlePre: From latest research back to shipped
services.heroLead: See ALiang's in-research AI collaboration directions first, then the service foundations already shipped — every item shows its real status, no invented progress, no inflated metrics.
services.timelineTitle: From research directions to shipped capabilities
services.timelineLead: See where ALiang's research is heading next, then which capabilities are ready to use today — filter by status to focus on what matters to you.
services.emptyState: No service directions match this filter. Switch back to All for the full research route.
services.closingTitle: Install the client first, then plug in your workflow
services.closingLead: The download page offers desktop and mobile entries by platform, with iOS clearly marked as not yet available.

price.heroLead: Published plans are billed per cycle and include model + IDE integrations. Subscribe from the console.
price.surchargeHint: Orders below {threshold} incur a {amount} handling fee
price.empty: No published plans yet. Check back soon.
price.closingTitle: Picked a plan? Grab the client next
price.closingLead: Subscribe in the console, install the client from the download page.

download.heroTitle: Bring ALiang to desktop and mobile
download.heroLead: The download page is split by platform: Windows, Linux, macOS are desktop entries; Android is the mobile entry; iOS is clearly marked unsupported for now.
download.headTitle: Pick a platform first, then enter the install flow
download.headLead: Pick the client for your platform, with system requirements and current support status.
download.statusMacSelect: {name} ({variant}) selected. Confirm your architecture to get the package.

cards.name: Windows
cards.desc: For main dev machines, Cursor / VSCode workflows, and local proxy debugging.

cards.name: Linux
cards.desc: For servers, dev containers, remote workstations, and automation environments.

cards.name: macOS
cards.desc: For IDEs on MacBook, model proxy, and mobile-linked debugging.

cards.name: Android

cards.name: iOS
cards.desc: The iOS client is on the way. For now, enjoy the full workflow on Android and desktop.

download.installTitle: Confirm your workflow before desktop install
download.installDefault:
# ALiang client pre-install check
1. Confirm current IDE: Cursor / VSCode / other
2. Confirm model entry: API proxy hub / direct service
3. Confirm whether mobile remote vibecoding is needed

installSteps.Windows:
# Windows pre-install check
1. Choose x64 / arm64 installer
2. Confirm current Cursor / VSCode version
3. Connect to the API proxy hub or local proxy
installSteps.Linux:
# Linux pre-install check
1. Choose AppImage or tar package
2. Confirm remote workstation permissions
3. Configure model entry in automation tasks
installSteps.macOS:
# macOS pre-install check
1. Distinguish Apple Silicon / Intel
2. Allow developer-signed sources
3. Sync with desktop IDE and mobile tasks
installSteps.Android:
# Android pre-install check
1. Confirm Android 10+
2. Allow APK install
3. Sign in and connect to remote vibecoding tasks

release: Windows, Linux, macOS: desktop download entries.
iOS: Coming soon — the client is on the way.
download.statusSelected: {name} selected. Confirm your system architecture, then get the current installer.
download.closingTitle: Before downloading, see what ALiang is working on
download.closingLead: The services page separates shipped and in-research directions on a timeline, so each capability's maturity is clear at a glance.
download.statusDownloading: {name} download started — confirm your architecture before installing.

homeHero.title: Next-Gen AI Gateway for
homeHero.descriptionFull: Experience the power of official API support with high-performance routing. Your all-in-one bridge to the world's leading AI models, engineered for enterprise-scale workloads.
homeHero.descriptionCompact: Experience official API support with high-performance routing. Your all-in-one bridge to leading AI models, engineered for scale.

homeFeatures.title: Engineered for Excellence
homeFeatures.subtitleFull: Built to handle enterprise-level workloads with military-grade security and official API integrations.
homeFeatures.subtitleCompact: Military-grade security and official API integrations.
homeFeatures.feature1Description: Direct access to Claude, OpenAI, and more with official credentials. No middleman proxies, just pure performance.
homeFeatures.feature2Description: Built-in redundancy and multi-region load balancing for zero-downtime performance when your users need it most.
homeFeatures.feature3Description: Advanced prompt management, real-time rate limiting, and granular cost tracking out of the box.

homeApp.title: Put AI coding
homeApp.description: The ALiang App lets you drive vibe coding remotely from your phone — commute, layover, café. Stay connected to your AI coding environment and pick up unfinished work with a single message.
homeApp.feature1Description: Send prompts to Claude, Cursor and friends from your phone. Watch code changes in real time and keep flow state even away from the desk.
homeApp.feature2Description: Sessions started on mobile sync back to desktop automatically — tasks, context, and file state carry over seamlessly.
homeApp.feature3Description: Code review, build results, and error alerts pushed to your phone in real time. Never miss a critical event again.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Quick-create users, assign packages, and manage distributor-visible user relationships.
adminUsers.missingSession: Missing session token. Please login first.
adminUsers.userIdOrEmailRequired: Sub2API user ID or email is required
adminUsers.roleUserIdOrEmailRequired: Sub2API user ID or imported email is required
adminUsers.loadDistributorStatsFailed: Failed to load distributor assignment stats
adminUsers.distributorEmailsRequired: Distributor email and user email are required
adminUsers.bindDistributorDescription: Admins can bind users to a distributor by email. Distributors only see those users' usage and can assign packages to them.
adminUsers.assignmentStatsDescription: View assigned package counts, assigned users, package value totals, and fast breakdowns by day, package, user, and distributor.
adminUsers.loadDistributorBindingsFailed: Failed to load distributor binding records
adminUsers.distributorBindingRecordsDescription: Shows all distributor-to-user binding/invitation relationships. Distributors see their own records in the distributor console.
adminUsers.name: Name
adminUsers.creationResultUserId: Sub2API user ID from creation result

distributor.title: Distributor Console
distributor.subtitle: Manage bound users, assign packages, and monitor token usage, active days, and spend.
distributor.quickCreateUserDescription: New users are automatically bound to your distributor account and can receive distributor packages immediately.
distributor.missingSession: Session token is missing. Please sign in again.
distributor.createdSuccess: {email} was created and bound to your distributor account
distributor.name: Name
distributor.assignmentStatsDescription: Track assigned package count, package value, daily trend, package breakdown, and user breakdown from assignment records.
distributor.invitationRecordsDescription: Users bound or invited to you by an admin appear here.
distributor.emptyUsers: No users are bound to this distributor yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your request traffic, package status, and action entry points.
dashboard.tokenMissing: Your session token is missing. Please sign in again to load your private dashboard surfaces.
dashboard.headerDescription: A lightweight home for request flow, token usage, package status, balance, and the next actions your account needs.
dashboard.tokenTrendDescription: Token consumption now follows the documented trend contract, with range and aggregation controls that stay inside the valid matrix.
dashboard.granularityNote: Invalid combinations automatically snap to the nearest supported granularity for the selected range.
dashboard.modelShareDescription: Share of total tokens by model for the same applied period. The slice order is deterministic: highest total token volume first, then model name.
dashboard.noModelShareData: No model-share data is available for the selected period yet. The pie stays empty until at least one model reports non-zero total tokens.
dashboard.noPackageDescription: Start with a package or prepaid balance to unlock routed usage.
dashboard.noSubscriptionLoaded: No active subscription summary has been loaded yet.
dashboard.metricsDescription: Quick-read account health using the exact home/account metric mappings requested for this dashboard surface.
dashboard.configDescription: Prepare your single user key for OpenCode, Claude Code, and Codex templates from one entry point.
dashboard.configHint: Generate or paste one routed user key, then switch between OpenCode, Claude Code, and Codex config views without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.purchaseDescription: One entry surface for package purchase durations and prepaid redeem-code top-up.
dashboard.packagePurchaseDescription: Choose one package tier, then continue to Stripe Checkout. The actual entitlement that gets fulfilled after payment comes from the package configuration saved in admin.
dashboard.currencyHint: Currency hint: {currency}. If redeem is unavailable upstream, this card shows a non-destructive error and keeps your current balance unchanged.
dashboard.ticketDescription: Capture delivery issues, model feedback, or billing questions from a single lightweight starting point.
dashboard.messagePlaceholder: Describe what happened and what you expected.
dashboard.detailsDescription: Move into the dedicated details page for request history, token trend depth, and API frequency analysis.
dashboard.configModalDescription: One routed user key powers every template below. Copy the rendered config exactly as shown and treat it as sensitive because the real key is embedded.
dashboard.pasteExistingKey: Paste an existing routed user key
dashboard.keySourceDescription: This is the only key source for every template in the modal. Paste an existing routed key from your account list and treat it as sensitive.
dashboard.createKeyFailed: Failed to create key. You can create one on the account page.
dashboard.sensitiveKeyWarning: Sensitive-key warning: the rendered snippets below contain your real user key, not a placeholder. Avoid screenshots, shared terminals, and pasted logs.
dashboard.copyCopied: Copied the currently rendered config with your real key included.
dashboard.copyError: Copy failed in this browser context. Select the config block manually instead.
dashboard.copyIdle: Copy uses the active template and active format exactly as shown above.
dashboard.templateContentLive: Template content is live and interpolated from your current user key. Changing the key updates all template views immediately.
dashboard.addKeyFirst: Add a user key first so the template output contains real credentials instead of an empty value.
dashboard.templateOpencodeHelper: OpenCode terminal client config pointing at your routed gateway.
dashboard.templateClaudeHelper: Quick terminal export for Anthropic-compatible CLI setup.
dashboard.templateCodexHelper: OpenAI-compatible config for Codex-style local tooling.
dashboard.stripeSuccess: Stripe payment completed. We are refreshing your dashboard package summary and applying entitlements now.
dashboard.stripeCancelled: Stripe checkout was cancelled before payment completed. No package changes were applied.
dashboard.prepaidSuccess: Prepaid redeem request submitted. Your balance card was refreshed, and any upstream processing delay is surfaced here instead of being treated as instant payment completion.
dashboard.loadingDetails: Loading deeper trends and recent request history...
dashboard.detailsSignInPrompt: Sign in again to view recent request records, token movement, and API request frequency trends.
dashboard.detailsTokenMissing: Your session token is missing. Return to the main dashboard or sign in again to load private request history.
dashboard.tokenTrendDetailDescription: Daily token totals from the app-owned aggregation layer, kept inline so this page stays in the same dashboard family.
dashboard.requestFrequencyDescription: A simple request-frequency trend for deeper reading than the home page, without expanding into full analytics tooling.
dashboard.usageLogDescription: This table reads from the dedicated usage relay and stays deterministic when the payload is sparse, partial, or fully empty.
dashboard.noUsageRecordsDescription: The usage relay is working, but there are no aggregated rows to show for this page yet. Once traffic arrives, the latest records will appear here without changing the layout.
dashboard.fetchingUsageDescription: Fetching the current pagination window from the dashboard usage relay.
dashboard.requestRecordsTrendsDescription: Review recent request activity and the two deeper trend surfaces exposed by the simplified dashboard contract.

aboutPage.title: Making AI accessible to everyone
aboutPage.subtitle: ALiang Gateway is a dependable bridge between you and the world's leading large language models. With a resilient gateway architecture, intelligent routing, and extremely low latency, we are redefining the experience of AI API services.

sections.heading: Our Mission
paragraphs: We believe that no line of code, product, or innovation should be held back by complicated onboarding, fluctuating latency, or unreliable links. ALiang Gateway's mission is to remove every barrier between you and the best AI capabilities—so you can focus on creating, and leave stability, compatibility, and performance to us.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraphs: ALiang Gateway is an intelligent gateway built around large language models (LLMs). We aggregate multiple leading model providers and expose them through a single, widely-compatible API, giving you a consistent calling experience.

Before a request ever reaches an upstream model, the gateway handles authentication, rate limiting, load balancing, intelligent routing, and edge acceleration—all transparently. You simply call us as if calling one dependable endpoint.

sections.heading: Why Choose Us
points: Reliable: multi-node redundancy and automatic failover, engineered for high availability.
Low latency: edge nodes and smart routing send every request along the fastest path.
Uniform compatibility: one widely-compatible API to switch between models seamlessly.
Transparent billing: pay for actual usage, with clear and auditable invoices.
Privacy first: request content is retained minimally and never used for training without permission.
Sincere service: honesty first—issues get a response, feedback gets heard.

sections.heading: Our Promise
paragraphs: We promise to be a product built for the long term: continuously refining our architecture, treating every user honestly, and never compromising on security and privacy. Whether you're an individual developer or a growing team, we want to be the most reliable stretch of your road to AI.

securityPage.title: Security is the foundation of everything we do
securityPage.subtitle: From the transport layer to key management, from data handling to infrastructure, we put security first at every step.

sections.heading: Transport Encryption
paragraphs: All API requests and console traffic are transmitted over TLS encryption, preventing eavesdropping or tampering in transit. We continuously follow the latest encryption standards and phase out risky legacy protocols in a timely manner.

sections.heading: API Key Security
points: Keys are stored encrypted, never in plaintext.
Create multiple keys on demand, each with independent permissions and quotas.
Rotate or revoke keys at any time without service interruption.
Abnormal calls and usage changes are monitored for early risk detection.

sections.heading: Data Handling & Privacy
paragraphs: We follow the principle of minimal retention: by default, request and response content is forwarded in memory only and not persisted; the operational logs we do keep are used solely for billing, troubleshooting, and security auditing, and are desensitized.
Without your explicit authorization, your request content is never used for model training or any other commercial purpose.

sections.heading: Infrastructure Security
points: Cloud-native deployment with resource isolation and least-privilege access control.
Audit logs retained for critical operations, fully traceable.
Infrastructure protected against abnormal traffic and DDoS.
Regular security assessments and dependency vulnerability scans.

sections.heading: Vulnerability Disclosure
paragraphs: We welcome security researchers and users to report security issues to us responsibly. If you discover a potential vulnerability, please reach out through our security channel; we commit to responding and fixing it within a reasonable timeframe.

privacyPage.title: We respect and protect your privacy
privacyPage.subtitle: This policy explains what information we collect when providing our services, how we use it, and the rights you have.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
points: Account information: basic details such as the email address provided at registration.
Payment information: processed by compliant payment channels; we retain only desensitized billing records.
Usage data: API call volume and billing dimensions used for settlement and service operation.
Technical logs: operational logs for troubleshooting and security, desensitized and time-limited.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
paragraphs: We use your information only to the extent necessary to provide, maintain, and improve the service, including: completing API calls and routing, calculating usage and fees, safeguarding accounts and service security, troubleshooting, and improving the product experience.
We do not sell your information to any third party.

sections.heading: Third-Party Model Providers
paragraphs: The essence of ALiang Gateway is gateway relay: to fulfill your request, the call content is forwarded to the upstream model provider you specify. These providers have their own independent privacy policies; we encourage you to understand the data-handling rules of your chosen provider.
Beyond what is necessary to complete a request, we do not pass any additional personal data to providers.

sections.heading: Data Retention & Deletion
paragraphs: Operational logs and billing data are automatically deleted or anonymized after the shortest period required to meet business and compliance obligations.
You may contact us at any time to delete your account and related data, except for data that the law requires us to retain.

sections.heading: Cookies & Local Storage
paragraphs: We use cookies and browser local storage to maintain login sessions and remember preferences such as language and theme. These stores are not used for cross-site tracking, and you can clear them at any time in your browser settings.

sections.heading: Your Rights
points: Access and understand the data we hold about you.
Correct inaccurate or incomplete information.
Request deletion of your account and related data.
Export your data.
Withdraw consent or stop using the service at any time.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Please read the following terms carefully before using the service. By using ALiang Gateway, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using any service provided by ALiang Gateway, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to accept these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any term, please stop using the service.

sections.heading: Service Description
paragraphs: ALiang Gateway provides an AI API gateway and relay service that aggregates multiple model providers and forwards requests through a unified interface. We do not guarantee the continued availability of any specific model or provider, and may adjust the list of available models based on upstream conditions.

sections.heading: Account & Responsibility
points: You must provide true and accurate registration information.
You are responsible for all activity under your account; keep your keys safe.
If you become aware of any unauthorized use, notify us immediately.

sections.heading: Acceptable Use
paragraphs: You agree not to use the service for any illegal, infringing, or harmful activity, including but not limited to:
points: Infringing the lawful rights or intellectual property of others.
Distributing illegal, harmful, or abusive content.
Attacking or disrupting the service or upstream providers' infrastructure.
Circumventing usage limits or conducting abusive crawling.
Violating the usage policies of your chosen model provider.

sections.heading: Usage & Billing
points: The service is billed based on actual usage; specific rates are as shown in the console.
Prepaid balances can be used to offset usage; insufficient balance may affect calls.
Except as required by law, fees already paid are generally non-refundable.
We reserve the right to investigate and address abnormal or abusive usage.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: The underlying technology, branding, and interface of the service are owned by us or their rights holders. The rights to content you generate through the service depend on your agreement with the upstream model provider; we claim no rights to generated content and bear no responsibility for its legality.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: The service is provided on an "as is" basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the service; our cumulative liability is limited to the fees you have actually paid for the service.

sections.heading: Changes & Termination
paragraphs: We may update these terms from time to time; updates take effect when published within the service, and continued use constitutes acceptance.
You may stop using the service and close your account at any time; we also reserve the right to suspend or terminate the service in the event of a breach of these terms.
